rules: Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing ('tracking-[0.2em]', JetBrains Mono).
Line Height: Tight ('leading-none') for headers, Loose ('leading-relaxed') for body.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
Apply radical weight contrast (e.g., Unbounded Black vs. Outfit Light).
DO NOT use purple or teal for primary CTAs.
Ensure text meets APCA standards. Use Text Shadow over 3D scenes if needed.
Hover states MUST have explicitly higher contrast and explicitly defined text colors.
Never use pure #808080. Always tint greys towards blue/indigo for space vibe.

surfaces.name: Liquid Glass (Apple Vision Pro variant)
surfaces.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Modal Overlays

surfaces.name: The Tracing Beam
surfaces.classes: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#FF0055,#00F0FF)] before:blur-md before:opacity-50

spacing_system: Use 2-3x generous spacing: p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

grids.rules: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Mix spans: Hero (col-span-8 row-span-2), Support (col-span-4), Vertical (col-span-4 row-span-2). Leave breathing room.
grid-cols-12 gap-4. 3D Canvas gets col-span-9, Tools get col-span-3. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp technical buttons. Neon glowing hover states (`hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_#00F0FF] hover:border-[#00F0FF]`).
components.cards: Cardless or heavily glassmorphic. Do NOT use default Shadcn white cards. Override with Liquid Glass.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to dark mode. Inputs have pure black background (`bg-black`) and subtle border (`border-white/10`), focus uses neon glow (`focus:ring-[#00F0FF]`).
components.ai_chat: Use neon magenta (`#FF0055`) accents. Tracing beam border for the AI Co-Designer panel.

rules: Hover states for all interactive elements.
Staggered entrance animations for bento grids.
Scroll-triggered animations (Lenis momentum scrolling mandatory for Discovery Hub).

3d_libraries.usage: Use <Environment> for cinematic lighting, <Float> for floating products, and <ContactShadows> to ground them. Do NOT render empty black voids; use subtle lighting.
3d_libraries.background: tsparticles or framer-motion 3D for spatial atmospheric dust.

image_urls.description: White and black electronic devices (Futuristic Product Preview)
Intricate futuristic circuit board with teal tones
Dynamic abstract design with glowing neon cubes

media.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for Duotone high-end tech vibe.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Ensure color-blind friendly palettes in product customizer.
Maintain minimum 4.5:1 contrast for small text.

instructions_to_main_agent: You must build a hybrid HTML/Tailwind + Shadcn structure. Use raw divs/sections for complex bento grids.
Do NOT use default Vercel-like aesthetics. Aetheris Spatial is a next-gen spatial marketplace.
For 3D elements, embed a `<Canvas>` from `@react-three/fiber` and populate it with modular meshes. Add orbital controls.
Inject 'Liquid Glass' classes heavily in headers and floating toolbars. DO NOT use complete transparent background in headers/overlays.
Include dynamic micro-interactions on product hover (scale up, neon glow).
Use Phosphor icons. You must `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
Implement Lenis (`@studio-freight/react-lenis`) for smooth scrolling in the main Discovery Hub page.
You have .js files not .tsx files, so strictly write .js / .jsx code and do not output typescript types.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Add transitions explicitly.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (`.App { text-align: center; }`).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
